events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: an incomplete bolt pattern on a flanged joint is a **fail** (high risk) — ASME B16.5 mandates the full bolt count/size per flange rating, and ASME PCC-1 requires the complete bolt set be installed and star-pattern torqued in sequence to achieve uniform gasket stress. Partial bolting risks uneven flange loading, gasket damage, and leakage/blow-out, so the joint must be fully bolted and re-inspected before proceeding to test or close-out.
